svg.title: Dosage progression over weeks — Wegovy, Saxenda, Mounjaro
svg.desc: A visual matrix showing how each medication's dose steps up week by week until reaching the maintenance dose, highlighting the different durations and complexity of each treatment scheme.
svg.text: once weekly · 16 wks to full dose
once daily · 5 wks to full dose
once weekly · 20 wks to full dose
